name: karvey-methods
description: Karvey — stack-agnostic spec-driven development method. Owned by HainTech.

plugins.name: karvey
plugins.description: Karvey Method (Afán, Selknam): stack-agnostic SDD spiral of 13 phases (0–12) + 14 support skills with an iteration loop (findings → bug/spec-gap/emergent), incident tracker, discovery backlog and engineering standards (golden paths + design-mode conformance gate). A synthesis of first-hand experience + Kiro + gstack.
